subject: revert(css): restore brand color palette — it's the app identity
body:
Brand palette (brand-50 through brand-900) is the app's visual identity,
not dead code. Restored the full 10-shade emerald scale. Available as
Tailwind utilities (bg-brand-500, text-brand-600, etc.) for any future
UI that needs brand-colored elements outside DaisyUI's theme system.

Tags: css, theme, revert
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
